meaning: n.守卫,保卫,保护,牢房,病房,行政区,监护,锁孔vt.守护,保卫,防止,挡住,躲开,避免
examples: Mr. Ward wasn't a rogue at all.
He landed in a psychiatric ward.
He worked as a nurse on the children's ward.
Hull Road ward councillor Neil Barnes said it had been a "proud moment for York".
Activision fired Infinity Ward's founders, Jason West and Vincent Zampella, in 2010 accusing them of misconduct.
